form.formComment: Won two starts back over 342m at Angle Park. Last start he finished 3rd on April 10 over 395m at this track behind Dimora Bluey beaten 4.5 lengths (22.81) in a Grade 6. Draw likely to suit. Brought a two-start winning streak to an end last time with the minor placing. Expected to feature again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 342m at Angle Park. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 342m at Angle Park. Likely to struggle this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted rail turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (30.13) at Sandown over 515m. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 15 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Low Block, beaten 7 lengths (17.43) in a Grade 6. Major threat on best form.

formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth on April 15 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Low Block, beaten 7 lengths (17.43) in a Grade 6. Major threat on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turn into home straight.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Angle Park (20.16) in a Grade 6, finishing a 2.25 lengths second. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, not going well enough. Needs to lift.
